meta.title: AEGIS — Turn Every AI Conversation Into Strategy
meta.description: AEGIS Enterprise Intelligent Integration System. Analyze Chatbase dialogue data to find response blind spots, mine real user needs, and provide SEO and social curation insights.

slides.title: Turn Every AI Conversation Into Strategy
slides.subtitle: AEGIS elevates intelligent customer service into a powerful business growth engine. We analyze interaction data to uncover operational blind spots and real user needs, delivering data-driven SEO and social conversion insights.

slides.title: Extract Real Business Value From Hidden Data
slides.subtitle: Turn 24/7 dialogues into high-value market trends and user pain point analysis, identifying response blind spots and providing evidence-based strategy optimization.

slides.title: Claim Brand Authority in the AI Search Era
slides.subtitle: Optimization and evaluation for AI search engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity, ensuring your brand is prioritized in intelligent responses.

metrics.title: Extracting Real Business Value from Conversations

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Just three steps to build an AI-driven business growth flywheel.

steps.title: Connect AI Service
steps.desc: Deploy a dedicated Chatbase to the client website, providing 24/7 automated customer service.

steps.title: AI Supervision Analysis
steps.desc: The supervision system deeply analyzes all conversation data to identify response blind spots and real pain points.

steps.title: Output Strategy Report
steps.desc: Transform analysis results into practical SEO, FAQ, or social content optimization suggestions.

services.title: Four Core AI Service Modules
services.description: We provide tailored AI solutions, from conversation analysis to automated output, driving corporate digital growth in all directions.

items.name: AEGIS AI Enterprise Intelligence Integration
items.subtitle: From data to strategy, a complete AI-driven digital growth framework
items.desc: Establish an 'growth-aware' intelligent brain, integrating data and decision paths.

items.name: AI Customer Service × Dialogue Analysis
items.subtitle: Automatically respond to inquiries while analyzing dialogues for market insights
items.desc: Turn 24/7 dialogues into high-value market trends and user pain point analysis.

items.name: Social Content Management System
items.subtitle: Plan social posts and articles based on industry context and competitor dynamics
items.desc: Automatically generate conversion-focused social content and deep articles based on industry hotspots.

items.name: GEO Optimization Assessment
items.subtitle: Diagnose website exposure performance in search engines and AI generative search
items.desc: Layout for the AI search era (GEO), ensuring brand priority in intelligent responses.

ai_to_ai.title: The World's First AI-to-AI Business Consultation
ai_to_ai.subtitle: Seamless AI-to-AI Consultation Feature
ai_to_ai.desc: When potential clients or procurement personnel use AI tools like ChatGPT or Perplexity to inquire about your products, AEGIS deployed AI customer service already has the ability to actively interface with these AI tools. Both AIs interact directly, ensuring your product information and quote suggestions are correctly and optimally presented in AI-generated search results, keeping business inquiries uninterrupted 24/7.

about.title: About RefineLab / AEGIS
about.desc: More than just building AI customer service, we provide AI-driven digital growth solutions. With Ivan Chen's deep experience of over 20 years and more than 380 projects, AEGIS helps listed companies across Real Estate, Semiconductor, Internet, and Electronics industries secure a solid competitive edge in the AI era.

footer.cta_title: Ready to let AI create growth for your business?
